# Maple Ridge Construction & Development

> Licensed general contractor serving Southeast Tennessee. New home construction, remodeling, and land development in McMinn, Bradley, Polk & Monroe Counties. Locally owned and operated out of Etowah by Zack Newman, a civil engineer (University of Tennessee, formerly Kimley-Horn).

## Contact

- Owner: Zack Newman
- Phone: (423) 506-2380
- Email: zack@mapleridgedev.com
- Address: 138 County Road 502, Etowah, TN 37331
- Hours: Monday–Friday, 8AM–5PM
- Licensed General Contractor (State of Tennessee), general liability and workers comp insured

## Services

- [New Home Construction](https://www.mapleridgedev.com/services/new-construction/): Custom homes built on your land, from floor plan and site work through final walkthrough.
- [Home Remodeling](https://www.mapleridgedev.com/services/remodeling/): Kitchens, bathrooms, room additions, whole-home renovations, interior updates, and system upgrades (electrical, plumbing, HVAC).
- [Land Development](https://www.mapleridgedev.com/services/land-development/): Site clearing, grading and dirt work, drainage, utility installation, septic/well coordination, and driveway construction.

## Service Areas

Maple Ridge serves four counties in Southeast Tennessee. Dedicated pages cover the primary cities:

- [Etowah, TN](https://www.mapleridgedev.com/service-areas/etowah/) — McMinn County (home base)
- [Athens, TN](https://www.mapleridgedev.com/service-areas/athens/) — McMinn County
- [Cleveland, TN](https://www.mapleridgedev.com/service-areas/cleveland/) — Bradley County
- [Madisonville, TN](https://www.mapleridgedev.com/service-areas/madisonville/) — Monroe County
- [Sweetwater, TN](https://www.mapleridgedev.com/service-areas/sweetwater/) — Monroe County

Also serves surrounding communities across McMinn, Bradley, Polk, and Monroe Counties (including Niota, Calhoun, Englewood, Riceville, Charleston, McDonald, Benton, Ducktown, Copperhill, Delano, Tellico Plains, and Vonore).
